Andy gives Jo another beating and follows it up by beating up Sam.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Dan turns up at the Rovers to sort things out with Steve but a fight develops, leaving the bookie badly injured. Gail falls out with Audrey, and Becky seduces a powerless Jason.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve discovers Dan collapsed on the floor of the cellar and calls for an ambulance. Jerry returns home and Becky's bubble bursts when she discovers Jason has been lying to her.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the death of Professor Miranda Thornton after she apparently killed herself when her dating video was leaked onto a vicious media blog - Lewis does not believe that Thornton's death was suicide and has qualms about Kit Renton, the blog's founder, and Sophie Leland, the owner of the dating website. When one of Renton's employees is found murdered, the police realise she must have been killed because she knew something about Thornton's death - as Lewis finds that Thornton, Renton and Leland were all at Oxford together 20 years before, he realises that this is actually an age-old revenge story...

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama. Nick finds himself in the midst of feuding mods and rockers in Whitby, and a gold hunt is triggered when part of a robbery haul surfaces in the village.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama. The race is on to find Nick when Kate goes into labour, teenagers are running riot in the village, and a spirited traveller puts a hex on Greengrass.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: David Mostyn is shocked to find his mother Delyth in bed with Dr James Kirkwood, a senior partner in the Midsomer Market surgery, but the beautiful divorcee is delighted when James uses the occasion to propose to her - her daughter Megan, James' practice manager, is equally outraged and especially when Delyth tells her they are planning to sell up and travel the world. James also has the difficult task of telling Dorothy Hutton, his late wife's mother who is still grieving, and asks his surgery partner Alan Delaney to check on Dorothy while lending him his brand-new Range Rover for the journey - when Alan has to leave the car during a storm, a pick-up truck drives into him at speed and kills him. Barnaby and Jones dig into Alan's past and discover that James once accused him of stealing 30,000 pounds from the practice, but it was put down to clerical error and the two doctors made up - as Barnaby and Jones investigate, they find that they must travel to Snowdonia to unravel the truth.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jo admits to Sam that Andy beats her but refuses to leave her husband. Daz takes Victoria to the van to see the stash, and the Kings continue their hunt for the thief.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sam takes Jo to the hospital after finding her doubled up in pain, and tells the doctor she's being abused. Matthew suspects Eli and Debbie are responsible for the van theft.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Dan refuses to tell the police the truth, prompting a furious Steve to turn to Becky for comfort. Gail considers visiting Sarah in Milan when Ted offers to keep an eye on David.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve calls on Lloyd when he finds himself stranded at Roy's after his night with Becky. A pent-up Carla learns Liam is coming home and Gail announces she's going to visit Sarah.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series. Nick appears to be uninterested when there is a spate of petrol thefts in the village, and Blaketon is enraged to discover that he is neglecting his job to spend time with Kate and the baby.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick struggles to combine fatherhood with full-time police work until his mum comes to the rescue. Meanwhile, Greengrass sets up a darts match with high stakes.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. The departure of Dr Dibbs sees Martin move back into his old surgery and agree to stay for a couple of months until a replacement can be appointed - determined to get to grips with fatherhood, he asks Louisa to move into his house so he can help to raise their child and even suggests that Louisa and the baby could move to London with him. Louisa reluctantly agrees to move into the Doc's house and offers to help with reception duties as Pauline has left, but she is none too sure about the move to London as she had hoped to resume her career as headmistress of the village school - meanwhile, Portwenn packs out the village church for the funeral of the Doc's Aunt Joan. As the villagers are shocked when Martin's eulogy becomes a health warning about the dangers to the heart of eating the wrong food, Joan's sister Ruth attends the funeral and demonstrates the same cantankerous character as her nephew after learning that she is to inherit Joan's house and farm.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Sleepless nights take their toll on Martin and Louisa as they try to find ways to comfort their constantly wailing baby, and Aunt Ruth deals with an intruder on the farm who has stolen the hubcaps from her car - when the thief is identified as Michael Dunwich, who lives with his mother Shirley, Ruth decides to pay a visit to the mother and her son. It soon becomes clear to psychiatrist Ruth that Michael is a bit odd as he has a collection of metal objects strewn around the garden - meanwhile, Shirley makes an appointment with Martin to discuss crippling stomach pains that she has been suffering from. When her son is out of the room, Shirley tells the Doc that she thinks that her son is trying to poison her so he can have the house to himself - elsewhere, new receptionist Morwenna Newcross fails to make a good impression by arriving late on her first day, appearing to be hyperactive, and getting sacked when Martin alleges that she is high on drugs.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on novels by Peter Robinson. DCI Banks is drawn into the criminal underworld of Soho when he reluctantly accepts an unofficial request from Chief Superintendent Rydell to find Rydell's missing daughter - with only an internet lead to go on, can Banks find Emily and persuade her to come home? Meanwhile, an armed robbery in Eastvale turns into a murder investigation after the thief is found brutally executed in his own home - DS Annie Cabbot struggles to identify credible suspects, but she and Banks come to a devastating realisation when another body is found.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Conclusion of a two-part story. With the discovery of a body in the nightclub, Banks finds himself at the heart of a murder investigation with any number of suspects and many unanswered questions - when a surveillance operation establishes a clear link between Barry Clough and the murder of Charles McKay, Banks and Cabbot realise that the two cases must be connected. The investigation then takes a number of alarming twists which push the detectives' relationship to breaking point and reveal a shocking secret within their own team.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the death of Professor Miranda Thornton after she apparently killed herself when her dating video was leaked onto a vicious media blog - Lewis does not believe that Thornton's death was suicide and has qualms about Kit Renton, the blog's founder, and Sophie Leland, the owner of the dating website. When one of Renton's employees is found murdered, the police realise she must have been killed because she knew something about Thornton's death - as Lewis finds that Thornton, Renton and Leland were all at Oxford together 20 years before, he realises that this is actually an age-old revenge story...

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. When Stan finds that living at home is cramping his love life, he decides to move out and rent a room.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Sitcom about a bus driver and his conductor pal. The inspector puts a new recruit on Jack's bus for training knowing that she will drive him mad with her nagging.

programme.title: Wycliffe: The Cycle of Death
programme.desc: The pilot episode of the popular West Country detective drama series based on the books by WJ Burley. When a bookshop owner in Penzance is brutally murdered, Wycliffe discovers that all is not well among the members of one of the area's most respected families.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway enter the archaic world of St Gerard's Hall when a visiting female bishop is found dead after drinking poisoned wine - was she was murdered because her liberal views contradicted those of the reactionary religious leaders of the college? When another two deaths occur and both mirror macabre murders from Jacobean revenge tragedy, Lewis and Hathaway realise that the motive is much more convoluted...

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a student dies during a clinical trial for a controversial new anti-depressant drug, is her death murder or suicide? Lewis and Hathaway investigate and, as the body count rises, uncover a web of lies, jealousy and madness that Lewis himself could fall victim to.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Gwenda Halliday has never been to England before - when she moves into the house of her dreams, she begins to have ghostly apparitions. On discovering that Gwenda grew up in the house as a child, the mystery takes a more sinister edge as she and Miss Marple realise that an unsolved murder was committed in the house.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's secret past as a British agent comes back to haunt him after a grisly murder in Midsomer Parva. A pleasant afternoon at a cricket match turns ugly when former county-cricketer - and ex-spy - Geoffrey Larkin is found gashed to death. Locals blame the 'beast of Midsomer', but Barnaby is unconvinced, especially when he discovers that umpire and retired spymaster Malcolm Frazer is using his home, Allenby House, as a safe house. Soon Barnaby discovers links to a spy ring that operated in Berlin during the Cold War, but his investigation is obstructed at every turn, and it seems as though shady dealings are still going on at Allenby House. Then there is another murder - can Barnaby solve the crime before any people get hurt? And will his police career survive a run-in with MI6? Guest starring Peter Davison, Alice Krige and Anna Massey.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When octogenarian Felicity Law puts a recently discovered piece by local landscape artist Henry Hogson up for auction, the painting causes a fierce bidding war. But soon after the sale, Felicity is found tortured and killed. She had announced that she would give the proceeds of the sale to the Arnold Simms School of Art, a school that helps criminals and which had recently lost its funding. Barnaby enlists Simms' art teacher daughter Matilda to help him navigate the local art world. He soon finds many tangled relationships between teachers, dealers and buyers. Things get more complicated when a Hogson masterpiece is stolen and Matilda's former lover Graham Spate offers another Hogson to greedy art dealer Anthony Prideaux. Then the death count begins to rise. The key to the case seems to be Matilda's 'little black book' - but can Barnaby and Jones find the book and catch the killer before anyone else gets hurt?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer University clashes with big business when science fellow George Jeffers threatens to go public with what he believes is a potentially lethal software glitch in a new air traffic control system. American software boss Clinton Finn fears he will lose millions if the truth comes out and puts pressure on the University authorities. But when village schoolteacher Emily Harte is killed by a hit-and-run driver, Barnaby wonders if Jeffers was the real target.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The body of a local troublemaker and lothario is found dead in the model village which is the chief tourist attraction of Little Worthy.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: As Grace navigates the aftermath of Sandy’s suicide, his newfound son Bruno, and a profound personal loss in his and Cleo’s life, his team is called to a Sussex beach when an unidentified male body washes up dead in a barrel. The very same morning, Brighton football stadium receives a chilling anonymous demand and is faced with an impossible decision. Roy, who is at the match bonding with Bruno, now finds himself locked in a frantic race to save hundreds of lives, which comes at great personal risk. But the day’s terrifying events are only just beginning when an eerie CCTV discovery comes to light, leading Grace to believe that the family of a wealthy club shareholder is being targeted. The question is why. When forensics on the body from the beach indicate that the victim may in fact be linked to events at the stadium, in order to save an innocent life from imminent death, Grace must enter a cruel world of corruption, where normal rules don’t apply, and human lives have no value.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The second part of a two-part story which closes the book on this long-running series. The past is catching up with Frost in more ways than one as a series of copycat crimes convinces Superintendent Mullett that his veteran DI's life is in danger - there are now two killers to bring to justice, but that will not happen until tragedy strikes.

The PI is then attacked by an army of small-time crooks who have been dispatched by a Mexican crime boss dead set on preventing him giving vital evidence in a forthcoming court case.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. A singer's father is released from prison after serving 14 years for a murder that he did not commit - fearing that he will seek revenge, she asks Theo for help in proving his innocence.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Little Girl Lost: Another adventure for freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar. A girl who claims to be Hitler's daughter leads the Saint in a merry little jig involving neo-Nazis. [SL,S] S5 Ep10

programme.desc: Rocky and Alex are planning a surprise birthday party for Ken. To get him out of the way, Harry pretends that he is being harassed and needs a minder for a weekend trip, but doesn't realise that he really is in danger.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan and Carter are called in when alarm bells start ringing all over their patch, but who is setting them off and why?

programme.title: Battlebots

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas is fired from a case and consoles himself by going on a lone mountain hike, but he ends up getting trapped under the wreckage of a crashed World War II plane that rolls on top of him as he tries to explore it.

programme.desc: A couple who have recently won the pools ask for Ken's help when they receive threatening letters - but Boon finds himself becoming emotionally involved with the lady.

programme.desc: Classic '70s police series. Regan and Carter are called to a siege at a bank where two armed robbers are holding hostages.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa Kelly tackles the most dangerous haul of the season, trucking a multi-million dollar, 100-tonne load across the entire state of Alaska. Elsewhere, Alex Debogorski races to keep pace in the load count, and Ray Veilleux faces the worst night of his career.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's chaos on the Dalton when a truck flips off the road and smashes into a tree. Elsewhere, Alex Debogorski faces tough questions from state police, and a careless mistake risks Lisa Kelly losing some of her hard-earned respect.

programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling - the roster features world-class talent including Jon Moxley, MJF, Ricochet and Adam Page, and many more who bring a freshness and energy into professional wrestling.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: Documentary series that examines some of the darker stories from the golden age of professional wrestling. The Dynamite Kid earned worldwide fame with a riveting self-sacrificing style, but violent confrontations outside the ring would destroy his family, his body and his legacy.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a loveable rogue and his right-hand man. A reformed gambler dies owing Arthur money, but a religious miracle seems to offer some compensation.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: American sitcom about a well-off bachelor whose life is disrupted when his brother and young nephew move in with him. Charlie enlists all his powers of persuasion to ensure that Jake is allowed to spend weekends at his house.

programme.title: The Car Years
programme.desc: With the year 1966 selected, Vicki Butler-Henderson and Alex Riley get behind the wheel of two British sporters, but whose car is best? Alex argues the case for the groundbreaking Jensen Interceptor FF while Vicki champions the Lotus Europa sports car, and a winning car is picked by three expert judges. Former F1 driver and broadcaster Karun Chandhok, former Top Gear Stig and Hollywood stunt driver Ben Collins, and classic car specialist and auctioneer Nick Wells make the big decision.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from fixtures in the 1984/85 football season - highlights include an impressive display from First Division leaders Everton as they face Watford, Gary Lineker in goal-scoring action for Leicester who host Chelsea, and a wonderful free kick for Second Division Sheffield United on their visit to Grimsby Town.

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from the 1984/85 football season - highlights include Manchester United's trip to a snow-covered St James' Park to face Newcastle United, a behind-the-scenes report at Third Division Cambridge United who host promotion hopefuls York City, and the best of Blackburn Rovers against Fulham in Division Two.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Tough '70s police drama series. When violent criminal Vic Labbett returns to England to recover the proceeds of an earlier robbery, Regan and Carter must stop him before he can get his hands on the loot and return to the safety of exile abroad.

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show
programme.desc: Magazine show to complement coverage of ITV horse racing - it is presented on-site from the main course each Saturday with additional weekday programmes during the big festivals. [S]

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore introduces football highlights from New Year's Day 1972 with a stellar cast list on show at Upton Park as Bobby Charlton's table-topping Manchester United travelled south to take on Bobby Moore's improving West Ham United. Plus, an impressive performance by Leeds United at Anfield against Liverpool and late drama at the Baseball Ground as Derby County continued their push for the title against Chelsea.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Another case in the classic drama series starring Jeremy Brett as Arthur Conan Doyle's legendary sleuth. An ailing Foreign Office clerk asks Holmes to retrieve a document about a highly sensitive treaty between Britain and Italy that an opportunistic thief has stolen from his desk.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Another case of the classic drama series starring Jeremy Brett as Arthur Conan Doyle's legendary sleuth. Young music teacher Violet Smith tells Holmes of her concerns over a mysterious cyclist who follows her when she rides from the station to her place of work.

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: Drama series about CS Forester's famous seafaring hero. Hornblower sets sail aboard HMS Renown on a dangerous mission to the West Indies, but events under the command of the tyrannical and volatile Captain Sawyer soon force the officers onboard to contemplate mutiny.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. The boys are excited by the prospect of a visit to a home in Iowa which is reportedly brimming with antique items.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole explores more UK rides and gives more tired bikes some much-needed attention in his workshop with the help of Allen Millyard. In this episode, Henry takes a glorious ride through the south of France and finds some of the twistiest roads imaginable - once back home, he meets the designers behind Aston Martin's first-ever bike and tells the story of the Suzuki 750, the bike that was nicknamed the Kettle.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Jack Jessee is left stranded and helpless by an avalanche. Meanwhile, Ray Veilleux faces Dalton with a premonition of death hanging over his head, and Hugh Rowland drives on the wrong side of the road over Atigun Pass.

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: Thrilling action-adventure based on the TV series of the same name and featuring the voice of Patrick Macnee, one of the stars of that show. British secret agent John Steed, under direction from 'Mother', investigates a diabolical plot by arch-villain Sir August de Wynter to rule the world with a weather-changing machine - Steed investigates the beautiful Doctor Mrs Emma Peel, the only suspect, but simultaneously falls for her and joins forces with her to combat Sir August.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the exciting and fast-paced quiz where each episode sees six hopefuls compete for a one-million-pound prize - however, only one player can take their place in the Hot Seat at a time and answer multiple-choice questions to work their way up the Money Ladder. Unlike classic Millionaire, each question is against the clock and there is no room for indecision - if a player answers correctly, they remain in the Hot Seat and continue up the Money Ladder, but if they get a question wrong, they are eliminated, the Top Prize drops down, and the next player takes their place. Each player is given one Pass - a chance to pass the question on to the next player - but in doing so forfeit their place in the Hot Seat and risk not making it back there later on. Only one player will have a chance to win the top prize remaining on the ladder, and the player taking on that question must answer it correctly to take home the cash.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When a mole's tunnel collapses Jon's yard, affecting Garfield's friends, the strays, and squirrels, Garfield comes up with a master plan that just might solve everyone's problems.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon is birdsitting his editor's parrot, Paxton, while Odie is away. But soon Paxton's doom and gloom attitude is bringing everyone down. Not even Garfield can help him but maybe someone else can...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's something very strange going on with the weather in town when it starts to rain sandwiches after a massive heatwave.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon, Odie, Garfield, and the twin follow what seems to be the source of the bizarre weather: a single cloud. It leads them to something and someone they could never have imagined.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There is a space invasion under Jon Arbuckle's roof, and the aliens are looking very much like Garfield's favourite meal: lasagnas.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Squeak and his mice family have taken up residence in Garfield's house, to Jon's despair, who will deprive Garfield of lasagnas if he doesn't turn things back to normal.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield's favourite restaurant, Vito's Pizzeria, is in jeopardy. The evil Mama Meany wants to buy it to expand his own restaurant, with the PizzaGrand 7000 capable of making ten pizzas a minute.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A mother bluebird is locked in a neighbourhood garage, so who will care for her eggs? That's a job for Garfield, who is sometimes quite a mother hen.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie is found by Al the Dogcatcher with no license on his collar so he puts him in the city pound with other stray dogs. Garfield will do everything to get his friend back.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie falls in love with a brush. Garfield becomes a little bit jealous about that and decides to make the brush disappear.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon finds an old accordion. It's unbearable for Garfield who totally dislikes this music. He will do everything to get rid of it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon has won a live turkey in a raffle and wants to prepare it for dinner, but he can't make up his mind to eat it. Neither can Garfield!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie are watching a horror movie... They're scared. Jon, who has forgotten his key, is knocking at the door. The two pets won't let him in until he's proven his identity.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is angry. A fake, secret agent is trying to steal the show and his popularity among his friends.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Garfield goes trick or treating and disguises himself as a scary Catzilla. But the real Catzilla has just escaped from the city zoo and will spread panic in Garfield's neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie has been thrown out of the house by Garfield and spends all night outside on his own. An alien crashes his UFO in the garden and loses a key part necessary to get back home!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal's owner has gone away on vacation and Jon has offered to look after Nermal while he's gone. Watch out, everybody! The cutest kitten in the world (he says so himself) is coming over for a week!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Who has stolen Pooky? After a night drying on the clothes line, Pooky has disappeared, and Garfield can't sleep without him.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's night-time and the full moon and the alignment of the planets are having a strange effect on Odie.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz's parents are coming over to meet Jon and Jon really has to make a good impression.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon goes to visit his brother, Doc Boy, who lives on a livestock farm. It's out in the country, and since Garfield is a real city cat, it's no picnic for him!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There is a Pet Show in town, and the winner will get a huge lasagna from Vito's restaurant. That's worth trying for Garfield. But Nermal is in the competition too...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's a new TV Show called "Instant Petmatching", which is about seeing if pets are matching with their owner. The result of the test is that Jon and Garfield are incompatible!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie finds the pot of gold at the bottom of a rainbow. The owner, a leprechaun, will grant all the wishes Garfield can think of.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie has found a strange, big bone in the garden. After some research, Garfield has found that it might be a dinosaur bone, and that could make him rich... enough for having lasagna forever, at least!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A salesman has sold Jon a cleaning Robot, which is very annoying to his two pets.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is really unhappy because he has to be on diet. And he's having nightmares about it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon can't manage to sleep. He's tried everything, to no avail. But Dr. Somnambulo has a new machine: the hypno-doron, still in work-in-progress.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz brings back an old mirror from her travels in Egypt. This one is enchanted and opens a door towards ancient Egypt where a Goddess, Neferkitty, has a secret wish: conquering the human world.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Two little devilish girls are coming visiting Jon. They really want to play dolls with Garfield and Odie, who only want to stay clear from them.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is stuck in a parallel world where cats have taken the place of humans, and vice versa!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon sends Garfield to Dr Whipple's Show in order for him to learn how to be a well-behaved cat.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield accidentally climbs into an outer space traveller's car, which sends him into parallel worlds.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Sir Leo, a famous TV Actor, looks very much like Garfield. So when he has to go on vacations, Garfield takes his place and gets to taste celebrity and glitter.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Our heroes are on a fishing trip. Odie saves a little fish and goes to explore the underwater world with Garfield.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz asks Jon to look after her goldfish while she's out of town. When Garfield finds this out, all he can think about is the great fry-up he's going to have.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Our friends are having a picnic by the lake. There's an extra guest: a cute little wolf, who will become Odie's new friend.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield finds a watch which can stop time.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's Liz's birthday and Jon wants to offer her a special gift: a nice family portrait. But taking this picture will be a gruelling experience for Garfield, Odie and Jon...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Professor Bonker has a new invention: the "Virtualodeon", which will bring the characters of Garfield's favourite TV Shows right into his living-room.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Herman the Postman is going on holidays. He has left his round to the young Steart O'Meara, who hasn't yet encountered all of Garfield's devilish traps...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's winter and Garfield and his friends, Odie and Nermal, are competing for the price of "the best Christmas carolling singer". There are cookies at stake!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon's cousin has passed away and has left his fortune to Jon and Doc Boy. But there's one condition: the one who will spend an entire night in a spooky manor will be the one to inherit everything.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: After Garfield slightly changes the recipe of Odie's birthday cake, it comes to life and spreads panic in town!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield has been mean to Odie again. Left in the garden, he's taken in by a neighbour, Nathan. Odie is happy with this new friendship, but he soon discovers that Garfield wasn't that bad after all...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield takes us through the ages to tell us the history of dogs. As we know, he has a poor opinion of them, but an incident will make him change his mind. After all, all dogs are not useless!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is bored. He has nothing to do. Well, not exactly: watching Odie and the squirrels in the garden, there's fun ahead after all!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Eddie Gourmand has built a super attraction park, made completely out of cheese. Squeak and his friends beg Garfield to take them there but with Harry working as a security guard, it won't be easy!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Pooky has disappeared again, but this time, it's Nermal who finds it. He is willing to give it back to him at one condition: Garfield has to be really nice to Nermal for the rest of the day!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield's cat instincts push him to climb on a tree. But how will he get down? Everyone tries to give him a hand, but they end up stuck in that tree! Now he's out on a limb; who will save him?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal doesn't believe in super heroes. Garfield does and he tries desperately to convince him. Even if that means disguising himself as Ultra Powerful Guy.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield receives a strange helmet which lets him read everyone's thoughts. He even catches aliens' conversations who are just about to conquer Earth! Garfield has to stop this plot immediately!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: After Odie dreams of being a super hero, Garfield mocks him for it. But when Garfield really gets into trouble, Odie puts his grudges aside and flies off to help him. And this time he REALLY flies!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal makes a bet with Garfield: if Garfield manages not to eat for a whole hour, he won't see Nermal for a whole month. Will Garfield be victorious ?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A caveman has been found in a block of ice. When Garfield accidentally thaws him, he falls in love with Olga. But if there's no caveman in the new exhibit, the museum will be ruined!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's a new employee at the pound: it's a robot with all the latest gadgets and it's job to make all the pets stick to the straight and narrow!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Tis the holiday season for Garfield and the whole gang. Jon has invited not only his parents and Doc Boy, but Liz's family as well, and so Garfield must be on his best behaviour.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon's Christmas plans take a turn for the unexpected, prompting Garfield to learn that there's more to Christmas than opening presents and eating!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: How can Garfield make the cutest cat in the country look ugly? It won't be easy but our orange friend is VERY motivated...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Ah! A pizza dinner in a countryside cottage, doesn't that sound nice? Yep, except when the house is haunted.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: How can Garfield get rid of Aunt Ivy, who hates animals? Garfield has an idea.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When the owner of an outer space fast food chain plans to turn all the inhabitants of Earth into chickens, Garfield becomes our unlikely hero.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A retelling of the history of the cat throughout time, as told by Garfield. But is it really a retelling of history, or a rewriting?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield, from now on, you're on a diet! Don't argue, it's for your own good!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Gravity-free cooking, have you ever heard of such a thing? According to Garfield, it's delicious...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Yahooooo! Jon has won the lottery!!! But... but where is his ticket?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Bad news: Jon's nieces are coming over! The ones who love to dress Garfield up? You got it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon has become allergic to Garfield. But what if the only solution is to get rid of him?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield has always said he would go to the ends of the earth to eat lasagna. And that's exactly what he's going to do!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: In your opinion, who should you call to rid a house of mice? An exterminator, or Garfield?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie is accidentally sold to Mr. Allwork, an awful lawyer who wants to sue Jon, and Garfield must find a way to get him back or never be fed again!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon, Odie and especially Garfield have to put up with an unexpected houseguest with big demands and an even bigger appetite.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It would be fantastic to get tomorrow's newspaper today, wouldn't it? Jon could play all the winning numbers in the lottery and then Garfield could eat tons of pizza, unless...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: So Garfield's been working the fields like nobody else? Has he been hypnotised or what?! Well... anything's possible...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: What starts out as a romantic night at Vito's for Jon and Liz could end up in a marriage with children, all thanks to Garfield stomach.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield will stop at nothing to get his hands on Chef Squisito's lasagna, which his wistful student claims is the 'best lasagna in the world."

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When Jon unleashes a trickster genie in a bottle, he gets the tables turned on him and must grant the genie his three wishes lest he be turned into a frog.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Shrimpy the Elephant is being mistreated by Dr. Whipple. When he escapes, it's up to Garfield to help him stay hidden.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Captain Garfield's ship is under attack by a group of rival pirates, Rottweiller, Hercules and Wilfred, who are after his treasure.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Things soon get out of hand when Garfield gets his paws on Dr. Bonkers cloning ray.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield puts Vito's skill and patience to the test when he hatches up a plan to exploit Vito's "pizza delivery under 20 minutes or else the pizza is free" offer.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When Odie swallows a Mexican jumping bean, he becomes a doggy bouncing ball and takes Garfield for a wild ride all over the town.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon is taken by the police when he is wrongly accused of stealing Mrs. Shmidlap's bracelet. It's up to Odie to find out what really happened.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Bruno, an alley cat, is sick and tired of watching Garfield get waited on hand and foot while he has to live in a trash can. And so he decides to make Garfield's home his own.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Could this be the end of Vito's Pizzeria? Garfield must save the two loves of Vito's life from the hands of Brent Mogul, real estate tycoon.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Dr. Goodiegoodie, an old TV show Jon used to watch, is no ordinary show. It's the show that watches you. When Dr. Goodiegoodie sees Garfield being mean to Nermal, he decides to punish him...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Paddy the Leprechaun has brought the rain with him and ruined Jon and Liz's trip to the beach. Garfield and Odie think they're saved from the clutches of Aunt Ivy.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Squeak has the power to see the future. How you may ask? Garfield doesn't care so long as he can make big bucks off of it. But when's Squeak's new "power" suddenly runs out, it's Jon on the line!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is preparing for hibernation. But sleeping for months when you live with others isn't so easy after all, especially when they can get you into trouble without you even knowing!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie show the pampered and spoiled, but lonely Prince Orloff what fun and playing is all about. Or at least Odie does, while Garfield watches.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When a mole's tunnel collapses Jon's yard, affecting Garfield's friends, the strays, and squirrels, Garfield comes up with a master plan that just might solve everyone's problems.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon is birdsitting his editor's parrot, Paxton, while Odie is away. But soon Paxton's doom and gloom attitude is bringing everyone down. Not even Garfield can help him but maybe someone else can...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's something very strange going on with the weather in town when it starts to rain sandwiches after a massive heatwave.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon, Odie, Garfield, and the twin follow what seems to be the source of the bizarre weather: a single cloud. It leads them to something and someone they could never have imagined.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There is a space invasion under Jon Arbuckle's roof, and the aliens are looking very much like Garfield's favourite meal: lasagnas.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Squeak and his mice family have taken up residence in Garfield's house, to Jon's despair, who will deprive Garfield of lasagnas if he doesn't turn things back to normal.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield's favourite restaurant, Vito's Pizzeria, is in jeopardy. The evil Mama Meany wants to buy it to expand his own restaurant, with the PizzaGrand 7000 capable of making ten pizzas a minute.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A mother bluebird is locked in a neighbourhood garage, so who will care for her eggs? That's a job for Garfield, who is sometimes quite a mother hen.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie is found by Al the Dogcatcher with no license on his collar so he puts him in the city pound with other stray dogs. Garfield will do everything to get his friend back.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie falls in love with a brush. Garfield becomes a little bit jealous about that and decides to make the brush disappear.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon finds an old accordion. It's unbearable for Garfield who totally dislikes this music. He will do everything to get rid of it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon has won a live turkey in a raffle and wants to prepare it for dinner, but he can't make up his mind to eat it. Neither can Garfield!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield and Odie are watching a horror movie... They're scared. Jon, who has forgotten his key, is knocking at the door. The two pets won't let him in until he's proven his identity.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is angry. A fake, secret agent is trying to steal the show and his popularity among his friends.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Garfield goes trick or treating and disguises himself as a scary Catzilla. But the real Catzilla has just escaped from the city zoo and will spread panic in Garfield's neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Garfield goes trick or treating and disguises himself as a scary Catzilla. But the real Catzilla has just escaped from the city zoo and will spread panic in Garfield's neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie has been thrown out of the house by Garfield and spends all night outside on his own. An alien crashes his UFO in the garden and loses a key part necessary to get back home!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal's owner has gone away on vacation and Jon has offered to look after Nermal while he's gone. Watch out, everybody! The cutest kitten in the world (he says so himself) is coming over for a week!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Who has stolen Pooky? After a night drying on the clothes line, Pooky has disappeared, and Garfield can't sleep without him.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's night-time and the full moon and the alignment of the planets are having a strange effect on Odie.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz's parents are coming over to meet Jon and Jon really has to make a good impression.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon goes to visit his brother, Doc Boy, who lives on a livestock farm. It's out in the country, and since Garfield is a real city cat, it's no picnic for him!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There is a Pet Show in town, and the winner will get a huge lasagna from Vito's restaurant. That's worth trying for Garfield. But Nermal is in the competition too...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's a new TV Show called "Instant Petmatching", which is about seeing if pets are matching with their owner. The result of the test is that Jon and Garfield are incompatible!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie finds the pot of gold at the bottom of a rainbow. The owner, a leprechaun, will grant all the wishes Garfield can think of.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Odie has found a strange, big bone in the garden. After some research, Garfield has found that it might be a dinosaur bone, and that could make him rich... enough for having lasagna forever, at least!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A salesman has sold Jon a cleaning Robot, which is very annoying to his two pets.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is really unhappy because he has to be on diet. And he's having nightmares about it.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon can't manage to sleep. He's tried everything, to no avail. But Dr. Somnambulo has a new machine: the hypno-doron, still in work-in-progress.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz brings back an old mirror from her travels in Egypt. This one is enchanted and opens a door towards ancient Egypt where a Goddess, Neferkitty, has a secret wish: conquering the human world.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Two little devilish girls are coming visiting Jon. They really want to play dolls with Garfield and Odie, who only want to stay clear from them.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is stuck in a parallel world where cats have taken the place of humans, and vice versa!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon sends Garfield to Dr Whipple's Show in order for him to learn how to be a well-behaved cat.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield accidentally climbs into an outer space traveller's car, which sends him into parallel worlds.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Sir Leo, a famous TV Actor, looks very much like Garfield. So when he has to go on vacations, Garfield takes his place and gets to taste celebrity and glitter.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Our heroes are on a fishing trip. Odie saves a little fish and goes to explore the underwater world with Garfield.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Liz asks Jon to look after her goldfish while she's out of town. When Garfield finds this out, all he can think about is the great fry-up he's going to have.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Our friends are having a picnic by the lake. There's an extra guest: a cute little wolf, who will become Odie's new friend.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield finds a watch which can stop time.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's Liz's birthday and Jon wants to offer her a special gift: a nice family portrait. But taking this picture will be a gruelling experience for Garfield, Odie and Jon...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Professor Bonker has a new invention: the "Virtualodeon", which will bring the characters of Garfield's favourite TV Shows right into his living-room.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Herman the Postman is going on holidays. He has left his round to the young Steart O'Meara, who hasn't yet encountered all of Garfield's devilish traps...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: It's winter and Garfield and his friends, Odie and Nermal, are competing for the price of "the best Christmas carolling singer". There are cookies at stake!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon's cousin has passed away and has left his fortune to Jon and Doc Boy. But there's one condition: the one who will spend an entire night in a spooky manor will be the one to inherit everything.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: After Garfield slightly changes the recipe of Odie's birthday cake, it comes to life and spreads panic in town!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield has been mean to Odie again. Left in the garden, he's taken in by a neighbour, Nathan. Odie is happy with this new friendship, but he soon discovers that Garfield wasn't that bad after all...

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield takes us through the ages to tell us the history of dogs. As we know, he has a poor opinion of them, but an incident will make him change his mind. After all, all dogs are not useless!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield is bored. He has nothing to do. Well, not exactly: watching Odie and the squirrels in the garden, there's fun ahead after all!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Eddie Gourmand has built a super attraction park, made completely out of cheese. Squeak and his friends beg Garfield to take them there but with Harry working as a security guard, it won't be easy!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Pooky has disappeared again, but this time, it's Nermal who finds it. He is willing to give it back to him at one condition: Garfield has to be really nice to Nermal for the rest of the day!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield's cat instincts push him to climb on a tree. But how will he get down? Everyone tries to give him a hand, but they end up stuck in that tree! Now he's out on a limb; who will save him?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal doesn't believe in super heroes. Garfield does and he tries desperately to convince him. Even if that means disguising himself as Ultra Powerful Guy.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield receives a strange helmet which lets him read everyone's thoughts. He even catches aliens' conversations who are just about to conquer Earth! Garfield has to stop this plot immediately!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: After Odie dreams of being a super hero, Garfield mocks him for it. But when Garfield really gets into trouble, Odie puts his grudges aside and flies off to help him. And this time he REALLY flies!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Nermal makes a bet with Garfield: if Garfield manages not to eat for a whole hour, he won't see Nermal for a whole month. Will Garfield be victorious ?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A caveman has been found in a block of ice. When Garfield accidentally thaws him, he falls in love with Olga. But if there's no caveman in the new exhibit, the museum will be ruined!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: There's a new employee at the pound: it's a robot with all the latest gadgets and it's job to make all the pets stick to the straight and narrow!

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Jon's Christmas plans take a turn for the unexpected, prompting Garfield to learn that there's more to Christmas than opening presents and eating!

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: How can Garfield make the cutest cat in the country look ugly? It won't be easy but our orange friend is VERY motivated...

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: How can Garfield get rid of Aunt Ivy, who hates animals? Garfield has an idea.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: When the owner of an outer space fast food chain plans to turn all the inhabitants of Earth into chickens, Garfield becomes our unlikely hero.

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: A retelling of the history of the cat throughout time, as told by Garfield. But is it really a retelling of history, or a rewriting?

programme.title: The Garfield Show
programme.desc: Garfield, from now on, you're on a diet! Don't argue, it's for your own good!

programme.title: The Garfield Show

programme.desc: Yahooooo! Jon has won the lottery!!! But... but where is his ticket?
